'''noshahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vegetal|vegetal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-sh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vegetal|vegetal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| noshahaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:noshahithi|noshahithi]] || [[word:noshahiji|noshahiji]] || [[word:noshahishi|noshahishi]] || [[word:noshahiki|noshahiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:noshahuthuthu|noshahuthuthu]] || [[word:noshahujuju|noshahujuju]] || [[word:noshahushushu|noshahushushu]] || [[word:noshahukuku|noshahukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:noshahuthu|noshahuthu]] || [[word:noshahuju|noshahuju]] || [[word:noshahushu|noshahushu]] || [[word:noshahuku|noshahuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:noshahufthuf|noshahufthuf]] || [[word:noshahufjuf|noshahufjuf]] || [[word:noshahufshuf|noshahufshuf]] || [[word:noshahufkuf|noshahufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:noshahethe|noshahethe]] || [[word:noshaheje|noshaheje]] || [[word:noshaheshe|noshaheshe]] || [[word:noshaheke|noshaheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:noshahothotho|noshahothotho]] || [[word:noshahojojo|noshahojojo]] || [[word:noshahoshosho|noshahoshosho]] || [[word:noshahokoko|noshahokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:noshahotho|noshahotho]] || [[word:noshahojo|noshahojo]] || [[word:noshahosho|noshahosho]] || [[word:noshahoko|noshahoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:noshahofthof|noshahofthof]] || [[word:noshahofjof|noshahofjof]] || [[word:noshahofshof|noshahofshof]] || [[word:noshahofkof|noshahofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:noshahïfthïf|noshahïfthïf]] || [[word:noshahïfjïf|noshahïfjïf]] || [[word:noshahïfshïf|noshahïfshïf]] || [[word:noshahïfkïf|noshahïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:noshahïfthïfthïf|noshahïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:noshahïfjïfjïf|noshahïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:noshahïfshïfshïf|noshahïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:noshahïfkïfkïf|noshahïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:noshahïfthïf|noshahïfthïf]] || [[word:noshahïfjïf|noshahïfjïf]] || [[word:noshahïfshïf|noshahïfshïf]] || [[word:noshahïfkïf|noshahïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:noshahïfthïf|noshahïfthïf]] || [[word:noshahïfjïf|noshahïfjïf]] || [[word:noshahïfshïf|noshahïfshïf]] || [[word:noshahïfkïf|noshahïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:noshahæthæ|noshahæthæ]] || [[word:noshahæjæ|noshahæjæ]] || [[word:noshahæshæ|noshahæshæ]] || [[word:noshahækæ|noshahækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:noshahathatha|noshahathatha]] || [[word:noshahajaja|noshahajaja]] || [[word:noshahashasha|noshahashasha]] || [[word:noshahakaka|noshahakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:noshahatha|noshahatha]] || [[word:noshahaja|noshahaja]] || [[word:noshahasha|noshahasha]] || [[word:noshahaka|noshahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:noshahafthaf|noshahafthaf]] || [[word:noshahafjaf|noshahafjaf]] || [[word:noshahafshaf|noshahafshaf]] || [[word:noshahafkaf|noshahafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:noshahasha|noshahasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:noshahshësha|noshahshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:noshahrosha|noshahrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:noshahmusha|noshahmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:noshahyasha|noshahyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonoshahnkshësha|gonoshahnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonoshahnkrosha|gonoshahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonoshahnkmusha|gonoshahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonoshahnkyasha|gonoshahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:noshashahasha|noshashahasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:noshashahshësha|noshashahshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:noshashahrosha|noshashahrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:noshashahmusha|noshashahmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:noshashahyasha|noshashahyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonoshashahnkshësha|gonoshashahnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonoshashahnkrosha|gonoshashahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonoshashahnkmusha|gonoshashahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonoshashahnkyasha|gonoshashahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:neshæhasha|neshæhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:neshæhshësha|neshæhshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:neshæhrosha|neshæhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:neshæhmusha|neshæhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:neshæhyasha|neshæhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goneshæhnkshësha|goneshæhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goneshæhnkrosha|goneshæhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goneshæhnkmusha|goneshæhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goneshæhnkyasha|goneshæhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:noshfahasha|noshfahasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:noshfahshësha|noshfahshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:noshfahrosha|noshfahrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:noshfahmusha|noshfahmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:noshfahyasha|noshfahyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonoshfahnkshësha|gonoshfahnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonoshfahnkrosha|gonoshfahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonoshfahnkmusha|gonoshfahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonoshfahnkyasha|gonoshfahnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
